managingTip.title: 💡 Managing your dates
managingTip.body: Open a date card → tap the <bold>⋮ menu</bold> (top-right) to <bold>Reschedule</bold> or <bold>Cancel</bold>. You can reschedule even after confirming — your match will be notified automatically.

pendingFeedback_one: Feedback required to unlock new weekly matches. You still need to submit feedback for <bold>{count}</bold> completed date.
pendingFeedback_other: Feedback required to unlock new weekly matches. You still need to submit feedback for <bold>{count}</bold> completed dates.

upcoming.title: No upcoming dates.
upcoming.description: When you and a match both like each other, a date will be automatically created!

completed.title: No completed dates yet.
completed.description: After a date is completed, it will be listed here!

cancelled.title: No cancelled dates.
cancelled.description: Dates cancelled by you or your match will show up here.

statusMessage.confirmed: Awesome, your date is confirmed! We'll email you reminders a day before and an hour before your date starts :)
statusMessage.confirmedFooter: If you can't make the date for any reason, please reschedule or cancel beforehand. Ghosters will be banned from the app lol
statusMessage.pendingIntro: Your date is created, now it's time to add your availability! Click this date card to do so.
statusMessage.pendingFooter: Once you've both added your availability, you'll both be able to confirm the date :)

delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this date? This cannot be undone.

deleted.title: Date deleted
deleted.description: The date has been permanently removed.

markedCompleted.title: Date marked as completed
markedCompleted.description: Hope you had a great time!

errorMarkingCompleted.title: Error
errorMarkingCompleted.description: Could not mark date as completed.
